full_text:
Lou Yi 樓異
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lou Yi (樓異). Helped Cao Cao onto a horse after he had fallen while fleeing from Lü Bu. Lou Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
